Joonhyuk Yang I am a PhD candidate in marketing at the Kellogg School of Management, Northwestern University.

  • Curriculum Vitae
  • Google Scholar
  • Contact: j-yang[at]kellogg.northwestern.edu
Research Fields

Quantitative Marketing, Economics of Digitization, Empirical Industrial Organization

Research in Progress
  • Digitization and Distribution: The Ends Against the Middle [SSRN]
    with Eric Anderson and Brett Gordon, revise and resubmit.
  • Commercial Success through Commercials? Advertising and Satellite TV Operators [SSRN]
    with Jung Youn Lee and Pradeep Chintagunta, working paper.
  • An Empirical Investigation of Ad Zapping using a Large-Scale Dataset
    with Lakshman Krishnamurthi, Caiyun Liu and Purush Papatla, working paper.
  • Risky Managerial Decisions under Time Pressure: Evidence from Major League Baseball
    with Broderick Lee Turner, work in progress.
  • The Value of Knowing What and How People Buy for Credit Business
    with Jung Youn Lee and Eric Anderson, work in progress.

Publications

Journal Articles
  1. Seasonality in the Non-US Motion Picture Industry: A Case of South Korea
    Yang, J. and Kim, W. (2014) Journal of Media Economics
  2. AgeCAPTCHA: An Image-based CAPTCHA that Annotates Images of Human Faces with their Age Groups
    Kim, J., Yang, J. and Wohn, K. (2014) Transactions on Internet & Information Systems
  3. FaceCAPTCHA: A CAPTCHA that Identifies the Gender of Face Images Unrecognized by Existing Gender Classifiers
    Kim, J., Kim, S., Yang, J., Ryu, J. H. and Wohn, K. (2014) Multimedia Tools and Applications
  4. Measuring User Similarity using Electric Circuit Analysis: Application to Collaborative Filtering
    Yang, J., Kim, J., Kim, W. and Kim, Y. H. (2012) PLOS ONE
  5. The Heterogeneous Effect of WOM on Product Sales: Why the Effect of WOM Valence is Mixed?
    Yang, J., Kim, W., Amblee, N. and Jeong, J. (2012) European Journal of Marketing
Conference Proceedings
  1. Acquaintances Clustering for Social Relationship-based Indexing of Digital Photos
    Kim, J., Jang, T., Yang, J. and Ryu, J.H. (2010)
    IFIP Human-Computer Interaction Symposium (pp. 163-174).
  2. Using Online Media Sharing Behavior as Implicit Feedback for Collaborative Filtering
    Go, G., Yang, J., Park, H. and Han, S. (2010)
    IEEE International Conference on Social Computing (pp. 439-445).
  3. Word of Mouth and Critical Reviews for the Motion Picture Industry in South Korea: On Mainstream and Non-mainstream Movies
    Yang, J., Kim, L., Amblee, N. and Kim, W. (2009)
    IEEE Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences (pp. 1-10).
